advisorThreshold.title: A dedicated advisor to support you.
advisorThreshold.body: Above a certain level of assets on the platform, a Wealth Management Advisor is assigned to you. They build with you a tailor-made Advised Portfolio: an asset allocation combining Smart Cash, Cash & Carry, bonds, equities and alternative solutions, calibrated to your goals and your horizon.

portefeuille.title: Advised Portfolio
portefeuille.subtitle: An asset allocation built with your Wealth Management Advisor, tailored to your risk profile, your horizon and your goals.
portefeuille.approachBody: Beyond the Smart Cash and Cash & Carry money-market funds, your advisor can offer a tailor-made allocation that includes bonds, equities, alternative funds and geographic diversification. Every proposal is documented, justified and adapted to your MiFID profile.

steps.s1Desc: An initial conversation with your advisor to understand your goals and your horizon.
steps.s2Desc: Your advisor proposes a tailor-made allocation: money-market, fixed income, equities, alternatives.
steps.s3Desc: Subscriptions executed via our regulated partners. Regular reporting and quarterly reviews.

faq.q1: Who is the Advised Portfolio for?
faq.a1: For clients seeking a tailor-made wealth allocation, beyond simple treasury investing. Entry ticket and fees are defined with your advisor.
faq.q2: What is my role in the management?
faq.a2: You remain the decision-maker. Your advisor proposes trades that you validate. No transaction is executed without your approval.
faq.a3: Quercus Capital acts as a Financial Investment Advisor (CIF) registered with ORIAS no. 24004789, and as a wealth advisor member of CNCEF, supervised by the AMF.

tobam.heroTitle: Capture high yields on the crypto markets.

metrics.riskAria: More information on the risk indicator

tobam.carryTitle: The art of arbitrage: generating yield without enduring volatility.
tobam.carryP1: The Cash & Carry mechanism (or basis trade) exploits a structural anomaly of the crypto market: Futures contracts (forward price) almost always trade higher than the Spot (current price).
tobam.carryP2: At Quercus, via the TOBAM fund, we capture this price gap mathematically and securely:

carrySteps.s1Desc: We buy Bitcoin via regulated ETFs on NASDAQ.
carrySteps.s2Desc: Simultaneously, we sell a futures contract on the CME with one-month maturity.
carrySteps.s3Desc: By locking these positions, we cancel the BTC price exposure and pocket the premium that converges to zero.

tobam.carryResult: The result: uncorrelated performance, minimal volatility and no exposure to crypto market price swings.

pillars.p1Desc: Long Bitcoin ETF (NASDAQ) + Short Bitcoin CME futures → capture the contango spread. The strategy also uses Ethereum when the opportunity is better.
pillars.p1Alt: Editorial illustration of two parallel pillars symbolising the long and short positions of the cash & carry strategy
pillars.p2Desc: The strategy enters a position only when the basis yield exceeds the cash rate + 2%. Mathematical discipline, constant timing optimisation.
pillars.p2Alt: Precision balance with a golden drop at the equilibrium point, symbolising the entry threshold of the strategy
pillars.p3Desc: TOBAM measures the annual carbon footprint of the Bitcoin exposure and offsets it via CO₂ certificates (VER — Verified Emission Reductions).
pillars.p3Alt: Oak leaf with golden veins on a molecular grid, symbolising the carbon offset of the fund

rolling.title: Monthly rolling
rolling.body: Futures rolled monthly. Average one-month position maintained at all times. Opportunistic leverage up to 125% when the basis is wide.

stats.title: Key figures of the strategy
stats.subtitle: Backtest CME Bitcoin Carry · December 2019 — March 2025
stats.disclaimer: Past performance is not indicative of future performance. Data from the TOBAM Crypto Liquidity backtest, for illustrative purposes only.

name: Official name
TOBAM Crypto Liquidity Fund
objective: Maximise BTC/ETH basis trade revenue with zero exposure to crypto prices

tobam.secSubtitle: Five regulated, separate and independent actors — your assets are never on the balance sheet of TOBAM or Quercus.
tobam.riskCardLabel: Non-directional strategy. Weekly volatility ~5%, max quarterly drawdown 0% on the 2019–2024 backtest.
tobam.riskCardNote: The Summary Risk Indicator (SRI / SRRI) is the European regulatory scale from 1 (lowest risk) to 7 (highest risk), published in each fund's Key Information Document (KID).

faq.a1: Low directional risk (crypto exposure fully hedged). Main risks: basis risk (the spread between futures and spot can temporarily diverge), margin call risk, counterparty risk (exchange or broker default), leverage risk, cyber risk (mitigated — no direct BTC custody, exposure via ETF only), concentration risk.
faq.q2: How is this product structured legally?
faq.a2: AIF in the Specialised Professional Fund (FPS) category under French law. Declared with the AMF but not approved. Open to professional investors and to investors with an initial subscription ≥ €100,000.
faq.a3: Bitcoin is the largest and most liquid crypto asset (~6× Ethereum's market cap), with the most active futures market on the CME. The basis trade has historically delivered ~8% annualised p.a. and the premium stayed above 3% in 76% of the last 5 years.
faq.a4: Long position: Bitcoin ETF on NASDAQ (no direct crypto custody, no hacking risk). Short position: CME Bitcoin futures (regulated exchange with clearing mechanism). Crypto custody if needed: CACEIS Bank (AMF-registered DASP), Taurus, BitGo.
faq.a5: Professional investors (within the meaning of article L533-16 of the Monetary and Financial Code) and investors with an initial subscription ≥ €100,000. Recommended minimum holding period: 1 year.
faq.a6: TOBAM measures the annual carbon footprint of the Bitcoin exposure and fully offsets it via CO₂ certificates (VER — Verified Emission Reductions).
faq.q7: Where can I find legal documentation?
faq.a7: The full prospectus is available on tobam.fr. NAV is available on request.

tobam.ctaTitle: Access the yield of the crypto basis trade.
tobam.ctaSubtitle: Institutional strategy. Daily liquidity. Zero exposure to crypto-asset prices.

velvet.heroTitle: Institutional power for your everyday treasury.
velvet.heroSubtitle: Maximise your treasury surplus with Velvet. A target yield of €STR + 0.30%, institutional-grade UCITS security, and daily liquidity with no entry or exit fees.
velvet.swapTitle: Turning equity performance into a stable money-market yield.
velvet.swapP1: Velvet uses a Total Return Swap (TRS) — a performance swap with the largest global banks. The result: a guaranteed money-market yield, protected from equity market swings.

swapSteps.s1Desc: Velvet holds a diversified portfolio of Tier-1 international equities that act as collateral.
swapSteps.s2Desc: Velvet swaps the performance of this basket for a guaranteed money-market rate (€STR + spread) with top-tier banks.
swapSteps.s3Desc: The investor receives a stable yield, protected from equity swings by the swap contract.

velvet.swapResult: The result: a steady daily yield, independent of equity markets, contractually guaranteed by BNP Paribas.

pillars.p1Desc: Velvet takes no directional bet on equity markets. The swap turns the basket's volatility into a fixed money-market yield guaranteed by BNP Paribas — the absolute anchor of your treasury.
pillars.p1Alt: Brass nautical anchor on parchment with deep teal ribbons — symbol of stability
pillars.p2Desc: The 0.30% premium above €STR is captured every day, with no entry or exit fees. +5.38% cumulative vs. +4.84% for €STR over 17 months.
pillars.p2Alt: Golden coin balanced on a marble pedestal — symbol of stable yield
pillars.p3Desc: Every day, BNP Paribas and Velvet exchange the performance. Whatever the market conditions, the contractual €STR + spread yield is paid. No default since 2014.
pillars.p3Alt: Precision balance in equilibrium with stacks of coins — symbol of the balanced exchange of the Total Return Swap

stats.title: Key fund figures
stats.subtitle: Performance & transparency — real-time Velvet data
stats.disclaimer: Past performance is not indicative of future performance. Velvet (Class I) data, net of fees.

velvet.collateralSubtitle: 100% Tier-1 international equities, diversified by sector.
velvet.secSubtitle: Five regulated, separate and independent actors — your funds are never on the balance sheet of LFIS or Quercus.
velvet.riskCardLabel: Velvet is rated 1/7 on the synthetic risk indicator (SRI). No default since 2014.
velvet.riskCardNote: The Summary Risk Indicator (SRI) is the European regulatory scale from 1 (lowest risk) to 7 (highest risk), published in each fund's Key Information Document (KID).

faq.a1: Management fees only: 0.25% p.a. (max) for Class I2, 0.20% for Class I3. No entry, exit or subscription fees. Yields shown are always net of fees.
faq.q2: What are the risks and how are my funds protected?
faq.a2: Your funds are backed by a top-tier bank (BNP Paribas). The main risk is counterparty default, mitigated by the collateral portfolio (Tier-1 liquid equities) held by the fund and immediately liquidatable. This strategy has never had a default since 2014.
faq.q3: What happens if LFIS Capital goes bankrupt?
faq.a3: No financial exposure to the manager's insolvency. Assets are held by BNP Paribas as depositary, separate from LFIS's balance sheet. You can always submit redemption orders directly.
faq.q4: Why do banks pay above the risk-free rate?
faq.a4: Holding financial assets on the balance sheet is costly for banks because of regulatory capital requirements. Banks pay a premium to funds like Velvet to hold these assets off-balance-sheet via a TRS — a mutually beneficial arrangement.
faq.q5: How do the daily flows work?
faq.a5: Every day, Velvet and BNP Paribas exchange the performance. If the equity basket rises, Velvet pays the gain to BNP. If it falls, BNP pays the difference to Velvet. Whatever the market conditions, BNP pays €STR + spread to Velvet daily.
faq.a6: No. The counterparty pays the daily yield in EUR, regardless of the currency of the basket's underlying assets.
faq.q7: Where can I find legal documentation?
faq.a7: The prospectus and KID are available on lfis.com.

roadmap.title: Get started with Quercus in minutes

steps.s1Title: Become a Quercus member in a few clicks.
steps.s1Text: Provide your details, secure your access via two-factor authentication (2FA) and verify your identity. A smooth, digital process compliant with the highest security standards.
steps.s2Title: Deposit your funds with peace of mind.
steps.s2Text: Make a transfer to your Quercus account. Your funds are deposited with our depositary bank (CACEIS / Crédit Agricole), guaranteeing full segregation and maximum protection of your capital.
steps.s3Title: Watch your interest grow every day.
steps.s3Text: From day one, your capital generates interest. Gains are automatically capitalised and reinvested daily, maximising the effect of compound interest with no action on your part.
steps.s4Text: Withdraw all or part of your funds at any time, with no exit fees. For any request submitted before 12:25, your funds are available the same day (T+0). Excellence is also freedom.

securityBlock.title: Your security is our absolute priority.
securityBlock.body: Quercus never holds your funds. They are kept by <1>CACEIS</1>, a subsidiary of the <2>Crédit Agricole</2> group, Europe's leading depositary. This full segregation guarantees that your capital remains protected, no matter what happens.

items.a1: Quercus charges a 0.25% management fee per year, already deducted from the net yield shown. There are no entry, exit, account-keeping or withdrawal fees. The yield you see is the yield you receive.
items.a2: Your funds are never held by Quercus. They are kept by CACEIS, a subsidiary of the Crédit Agricole group and Europe's leading depositary. This full segregation means your capital remains protected even if Quercus were to fail.
items.q3: Can I withdraw my money on a Sunday?
items.a3: You can submit a withdrawal request at any time, including weekends. Requests are processed on business days. For any request submitted before 12:25 on a business day, your funds are available the same day (T+0 liquidity).
items.a4: Yes. Quercus is registered as a Financial Investment Advisor (CIF) and Insurance Broker (COA) with ORIAS (no. 24004789). We are supervised by the AMF and comply with anti-money-laundering (AML/CFT) regulatory obligations.
